bizcity_automation_workflows.purpose: Native xyflow-based visual workflow definitions (replaces legacy WAIC bizcity_workflows).

updated_at.type: DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

bizcity_automation_runs.purpose: One row per workflow execution; status machine = queued/running/ok/fail/cancelled.

bizcity_automation_logs.purpose: Per-node log of every run; primary feed for FE RunTimeline + SSE stream.

bizcity_automation_templates.purpose: BE-7 — Template library: reusable workflow blueprints (built-in seeded + user-saved). `instantiate` clones graph_json into bizcity_automation_workflows.

category.doc: general | cskh | lead | report | webhook | mpr

updated_at.type: DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

history.change: Initial schema for native automation runner (workflows + runs + logs). Replaces legacy WAIC bizcity_workflows.

BE-4 — contract docs only (no DDL): trigger_config_json now supports keys { schedule, filter, page_id, slug, secret }. Scheduler bridge consumes bizcity_crm_events rows with event_type='automation_workflow' (metadata = { workflow_id, payload, defer }). Webhook public route /bizcity-automation/v1/webhook/{slug} added.

BE-6 — contract docs only (no DDL). trigger_type enum extends to { manual, zalo_inbound, fb_message, fb_comment, telegram_inbound, cron, webhook, twinbrain_intent }. trigger_config_json gains key `instance_id` (oa_id Zalo / page_id FB / bot Telegram; empty = match all). bizcity_automation_logs now also stores per-MPR-layer events with block_id='llm.mpr_think.event' (FE timeline). New REST routes: GET /channel-registry, GET /cron-health, POST /test/listen, GET /test/poll, POST /test/stop. New option `bizcity_automation_cron_last_tick` (autoload=no) for cron freshness probe. New option `bizcity_automation_listener_active` (autoload=no) — index of active test-listener transient ids.

BE-7 — Workflow Templates. New table bizcity_automation_templates (id/slug/name/description/category/source/trigger_type/graph_json/trigger_config_json/tags/icon/version/is_active/use_count + audit cols). New options bizcity_automation_templates_seed_version (autoload=no) — bumps when builtin seeder runs. New REST routes: GET /templates (filter category/source/search), GET /templates/(?P<id>\d+), POST /templates/(?P<id>\d+)/instantiate (clones to workflows + bumps use_count), POST /workflows/(?P<id>\d+)/save-as-template (user → templates). Built-in seeder ships 5 blueprints: tpl_zalo_cskh_v1, tpl_fb_lead_capture_v1, tpl_mpr_auto_reply_v1, tpl_cron_daily_report_v1, tpl_webhook_crm_v1 — all idempotent (slug-unique upsert).

BE-7.B — Pilot workflows + Fallback rule (R-FB-NOMATCH). Contract docs only (no DDL). trigger_config_json now supports keys { is_fallback: bool, priority: int } for channel inbound matcher. Matcher behavior (`BizCity_Automation_Trigger_Matcher::on_channel_message`): split workflows into matched (filter PASS) vs fallback (is_fallback=true); only enqueue fallback when matched is empty; sort fallback by priority DESC. Seeder bumped to 1.2.0, adds 2 builtin pilot blueprints: tpl_zalo_pilot_keyword_v1 (keyword 'bảng giá' → KG → compose → reply, priority=10), tpl_zalo_pilot_fallback_brain_v1 (is_fallback=true, priority=0 → llm.mpr_think with user-bound notebook via TwinBrain Stage 1 selector → reply_zalo + CRM log). Both instantiate with enabled=0 (manual supervision). Guarantees every Zalo inbound that doesn't match any keyword always gets a TwinBrain response grounded on the user's bound notebook.

BE-7.C — Multi-turn slot (pending state) + 3 pilot templates. Contract docs only (no DDL — storage = WP transient `bizcity_auto_pending_<md5(chat_id)>`, default TTL 900s). New helper class `BizCity_Automation_Pending_State` (get/set/patch/clear/has_resume). Matcher precedence updated: resume (pending.workflow_id) > matched (keyword) > fallback (is_fallback). Resume preempts other rules; clears pending on workflow disabled/missing. New action blocks: action.capture_attachment, action.set_pending_intent, action.consume_attachment, action.publish_wp_post (default status=draft), action.publish_fb_post (delegates to scheduler event_type=fb_post via existing BizCity_FB_Publisher — R-CH compliant). Seeder bumped 1.3.0 + 3 builtin templates: tpl_image_capture_v1 (turn 1 lưu ảnh + ask purpose, priority=12), tpl_post_web_with_image_v1 (keyword 'đăng bài' → ask image → resume → LLM gen → publish_wp_post draft, priority=15), tpl_post_fb_with_image_v1 (keyword 'đăng fb' → ask image → resume → publish_fb_post mode=scheduled+5m, priority=15). All enabled=0 on instantiate (manual supervision). Replaces legacy `twf_handle_image_attachment` + `bizgpt_image_<md5>` transient pattern.

BE-7.D — CRM Bridge canonical + production hardening. Contract docs only (no DDL). Root cause fix: trước khi BE-7.D, tất cả automation block gọi filter `bizcity_crm_event_create_filter` + action `bizcity_crm_event_create` nhưng KHÔNG có listener nào trong workspace → row CRM không bao giờ được insert → Scheduler page trống. Fix: thêm `BizCity_Automation_CRM_Bridge` gọi thẳng `BizCity_Scheduler_Manager::create_event()` với field map đúng sanitize_row contract (start_at thay due_at, description thay body, status string thay int, source='workflow' thay vì 'automation_run'). Refactor 4 call sites: `class-automation-runner.php::emit_crm_bridge` (event_type='task' vì 'automation_run' không trong whitelist), `class-action-create-crm-event.php` (bỏ field due_at/body, thêm start_at/description), `class-action-publish-fb-post.php` (đổi field name fb_post payload), `class-action-publish-wp-post.php` (thêm mirror_to_scheduler mặc định → row event_type='web_post' status='done' metadata{web_post_id, web_permalink, web_publish_status='published'}). New block `action.schedule_event` (generic CRM row creator, hỗ trợ reminder_zalo). Seeder 1.4.0 + builtin template `tpl_schedule_event_v1` keyword 'lên lịch' → LLM extract slots → schedule_event. Productión flow check: 'dăng bài' → publish_wp_post → 1 row crm_events (web_post, status=done) + 1 WP post draft. 'đăng fb' → publish_fb_post → 1 row crm_events (fb_post, status=active, due+5m) → cron fire → BizCity_FB_Publisher publish + ghi fb_post_id. 'lên lịch' → schedule_event → 1 row crm_events (task hoaặc reminder_zalo, status=active). Tất cả visible Scheduler admin page.

BE-7.E — Realtime test runner + per-node status badges + smoke-test templates. Contract docs only (no DDL). Problem: trước BE-7.E, FE 'Chạy thử' button chỉ chạy MOCK local (block.simulate()), không gọi BE thật → user không debug được production blocks; SSE endpoint `/runs/:id/events` đã có nhưng FE không subscribe. Solution: (1) REST `/workflows/:id/run` thêm query param `async=1` → schedules `wp_schedule_single_event(time(), 'bizcity_automation_run_async', [run_id])` + `spawn_cron()` → trả 202 + run_id ngay lập tức trong khi runner thực thi ở loopback request. Bootstrap thêm listener `bizcity_automation_run_async` → `BizCity_Automation_Runner::execute($run_id)`. (2) FE rewrite `runtime/runner.js`: detect numeric meta.id → POST async + open `EventSource('/runs/:id/events?_wpnonce=...&max_seconds=60')` → parse SSE 'log' / 'end' / 'timeout' events → store.setNodeStatus(node_id, status, output) realtime. Fallback sang MOCK BFS với block.simulate() khi workflow chưa save (meta.id='wf_new') hoặc REST lỗi. (3) FE store thêm fields: nodeStatus{[id]:0|1|2|3}, nodeOutputs{[id]:obj}, runDbId, runMode ('mock'|'async'|'sync'), runStatus, runError. (4) FE NodeShell.jsx render absolute-positioned status badge top-right (Loader2 spin / CheckCircle2 / XCircle / MinusCircle) + colored ring border khớp status. Status int = LOG_STATUS_RUNNING/OK/FAIL/SKIP từ runner. (5) Seeder 1.5.0: 2 smoke-test templates category='test' source='builtin' enabled=0: `tpl_test_smoke_manual_v1` (trigger.manual → llm.compose_reply → action.create_crm_event — pipeline ngắn nhất verify SSE + per-node badges + DB write) và `tpl_test_smoke_branch_v1` (trigger.manual → logic.condition → 2 action.create_crm_event branches — verify branch routing + skip status=3). Cả hai dùng trigger.manual để chạy không cần channel binding. R-DCL: contract-only bump, không tạo bảng/cột mới.

PG-S5 — Pause / Step / Resume runner (Playground breakpoints). DDL: ADD COLUMN `bizcity_automation_runs.debug_state VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''` (values: ''|'pausing'|'stepping'|'paused_before:<node_id>'); ADD COLUMN `bizcity_automation_workflows.debug_breakpoints_json LONGTEXT NULL` (format: {"<node_id>":{"before":true|false,"after":bool,"on_error":bool}}). Both ADD-only → handled by Auto_Create. Runner now allows re-entry when status=RUNNING && debug_state matches paused_*; skips nodes that already have an OK/FAIL log row (idempotent resume). New REST routes (admin-only, NS bizcity-automation/v1): POST /runs/{run_id}/pause (set debug_state='pausing'), POST /runs/{run_id}/step (set 'stepping' + inline continue), POST /runs/{run_id}/resume (clear state + inline continue). Workflow PUT /workflows/{id} accepts new payload key `debug_breakpoints` (array<node_id, {before,after,on_error}>) — persisted via repo normalise(). FE Topbar surfaces ⏸ ⏭ ▶ buttons when run is RUNNING; Inspector adds 'Breakpoint before' toggle per node. R-DCL: ADD-only DDL, validator must pass.

PG-S6 — Replay (Playground re-run with same payload). DDL: ADD COLUMN `bizcity_automation_runs.parent_run_id VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''` + ADD INDEX `idx_parent_run_id (parent_run_id)`. ADD-only → handled by Auto_Create. Repo `BizCity_Automation_Repo_Runs::enqueue()` adds optional 3rd arg `$parent_run_id` (default ''); hydrate() now exposes `parent_run_id` field. New REST route (admin-only, NS bizcity-automation/v1): POST /runs/{run_id}/replay — loads original run, copies workflow_id + trigger_payload_json, calls enqueue() with parent_run_id=original.run_id, schedules async via wp_schedule_single_event('bizcity_automation_run_async') + spawn_cron(); returns 202 + new run_id. FE Topbar surfaces ↺ Replay button when run finished (status ∈ {ok, fail, cancelled}); click → swap runDbId to new run + restart polling. R-DCL: ADD-only DDL, validator must pass.
